title: CHILDBIRTH AND PARENTING PREPARATION CLASSES - 211info
text: CENTER FOR WOMEN’S HEALTH CHILDBIRTH AND PARENTING PREPARATION CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of prenatal, childbirth, newborn care, breastfeeding education, and infant safety classes. Also offers several support groups, such as a new moms group. 808 SW Campus Drive 7th Floor Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Varies Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 418-4500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 418-4500 Reception Main (503) 418-4500 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: Varies by class. Accepts most major insurance plans. Some classes may be covered by OHP. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: OHSU Center for Women's Health, located on the 7th floor of the Peter O. Kohler Pavilion on the OHSU Marquam Hill Campus. Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Childbirth Education General Expectant/New Parent Assistance Infant and Child Safety Education Parent Support Groups * Mothers Pregnancy/Childbirth Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - WOMEN'S MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER FOR WOMEN’S HEALTH
